basic_details.job_title: TISS Communications and Social Media Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) Communications and Social Media Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 20 April 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the TISS Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: The Institute reserves the right to relax age in the case of persons already holding comparable positions in a University/Research Institution of repute.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in Communications, Public Relations, Journalism, Management, or a related field, Master's degree (or equivalent) in Communications, Public Relations, Journalism, Management, or a related field
qualification.details: Bachelor's degree in Communications, Public Relations, Journalism, Management, or a related field with at least 5 years of professional experience in public relations, communications, or social media management. OR Master's degree (or equivalent) in Communications, Public Relations, Journalism, Management, or a related field with at least 2 years of professional experience in public relations, communications, or social media management.

selection_process: Shortlisting Written Test Personal Interaction Skill Test Interview
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TISS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TISS Communications and Social Media Officer position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the TISS Communications and Social Media Officer recruitment is 15th May 2026. It is advisable to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Bachelor's degree in Communications, Public Relations, Journalism, Management, or a related field with significant professional experience, or a Master's degree in a similar field with relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Communications and Social Media Officer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Communications and Social Media Officer position as per the official notification released by TISS.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Communications and Social Media Officer position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 80,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for TISS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee varies by category: Rs. 500/- for General/OBC, Rs. 125/- for SC/ST, and Nil for Women candidates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of candidates, followed by a written test, personal interaction, skill test, and a final interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: The job type for the Communications and Social Media Officer position is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the TISS located?
faq.answer: Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) is located in Mumbai, Maharashtra.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from outside Maharashtra apply?
faq.answer: The notification mentions applications are invited from eligible candidates in Maharashtra. However, it is best to check the detailed eligibility criteria in the official notification for any specific domicile requirements.

faq.question: Q10. How can I get the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided in this article, under the "Official Notification PDF" link.
